ddt:Target.Name: CCGW420_SW9.1_00.09.18.ddt
ddt:Target.Description: Note: A formal request/response parameter xx, yy, zz,... is only relevant, if its data have a formal specification within the same chapter.

Item.Text: FM (Frequency Modulated) / PWM (Pulse Width Modulated) Failures
Device and failure type ODB coding
FM (Frequency Modulated) / PWM (Pulse Width Modulated) Failures
circuit short to ground or open
circuit short to battery or open
signal rate of change below threshold
signal rate of change above threshold
signal bias level out of range / zero adjustment failure
signal has too few transitions / events
signal has too many transitions / events
alive / sequence counter incorrect / not updated
value of signal protection calculation incorrect
Component or system operation obstructed or blocked

Data.Name: DTCExtendedData.AgingCounter
Data.Comment: Description of the extendedData AgingCounter (use by Failure Page to decode data)

Data.Name: DTCExtendedData.DTCOccurrenceCounter
Data.Comment: Description of the extendedData DTCOccurrenceCounter (use by Failure Page to decode data)

Data.Name: DTCExtendedData.Mileage
Data.Comment: Description of the extendedData Mileage (use by Failure Page to decode data)

Request.Name: OutputControl.Start.Internal Digital Outputs for EOL. Control
Set TRC calibration parameters to default Start
ClearDiagnosticInformation.All
Request.Comment: The ClearDiagnosticInformation service is used by the tool to clear diagnostic information in an ECUs memory

Request.Name: TesterPresent.WithResponse
Request.Comment: This request enables P2P tester present for tool (Screen, IOctl,)

TANK STUCK CHECK CONSUMPTION FUEL SENSOR

Test.Description: The outside temperature sensor has an electrical fault. circuit short to ground. Or Sensor defect
The outside temperature sensor has an electrical fault. Circuit short to battery or open.
The input ''Cruise control'' has an electrical fault. Circuit Voltage Above Threshold.
There is an internal control unit fault in the RAM memory. General Memory Failure.
There is an internal error in the EEPROM of the control unit. Data memory failure.
An incorrect GW Routing Table was detected. General Memory Failure.
No GW Routing Table can be detected. General Memory Failure.
An incorrect variant coding or configuration was detected.
An internal fault in the analog/digital converter was detected. Component Failure
An incorrect fuel algorithm configuration was detected.
The oil level sensor has an electrical fault. Circuit Short To Ground.
The oil level sensor has an electrical fault. Circuit Short To Battery or Open.
The fuel level sensor has an electrical fault. Circuit Short To Ground.
The fuel level sensor has an electrical fault. Circuit Short To Battery or Open.
The fuel level sensor has an electrical fault. Signal Stuck In Range.
Button Steering Wheel Heater has a malfunction.
The output for the left front turn signal lamp has a malfunction. Circuit Short To Ground.
The output for the left front turn signal lamp has a malfunction. Circuit Short To Battery.
The output for the left front turn signal lamp has a malfunction. Circuit Open.
The output for the right front turn signal lamp has a malfunction. Circuit Short To Ground.
The output for the right front turn signal lamp has a malfunction. Circuit Short To Battery.
The output for the right front turn signal lamp has a malfunction. Circuit Open.
Output ''Circuit 58d'' has a malfunction.Circuit Short To Ground.
Output ''Circuit 58d'' has a malfunction.Circuit Short To Battery.
The Input_TWM_1 has a malfunction.
The Input_TWM_1 has a malfunction. Circuit short to ground or open.
The Input_TWM_2 has a malfunction.
The Input_TWM_2 has a malfunction. Circuit short to ground or open.
The Input_TWM_3 has a malfunction.
The Input_TWM_3 has a malfunction. Circuit short to ground or open.
The Input_TWM_4 has a malfunction.
